parse.title: Now That's What I Call Music! 47 (American series)
parse.wikitext:
{{Now-num|47th|U.S.|47}} {{Infobox album | name = Now That's What I Call Music! 47 | type = Compilation | artist = various artists | cover = Now_Thats_Music_47_US_series.jpg | alt = | released = August 6, 2013 | recorded = | venue = | studio = | genre = | length = 71:17 | label = [[Sony Music]] | producer = | chronology = Numbered series | prev_title = [[Now That's What I Call Music! 46 (U.S. series)|Now That's What I Call Music! 46]] | prev_year = 2013 | next_title = [[Now That's What I Call Music! 48 (U.S. series)|Now That's What I Call Music! 48]] | next_year = 2013 }} '''''Now That's What I Call Music! 47''''', released on August 6, 2013, is the 47th edition of the ''[[Now That's What I Call Music!|Now!]]'' series in the United States. The album features the number-one [[Billboard Hot 100|''Billboard'' Hot 100]] hit, "[[When I Was Your Man]]", by [[Bruno Mars]]. ''Now! 47'' debuted at number two on the [[Billboard 200|''Billboard'' 200]] albums chart with sales of 82,000 copies in its first week of release.{{cite magazine|first=Keith|last=Caulfield|title=The Civil Wars Debut at No. 1 on Billboard 200 Albums Chart|url=http://www.billboard.com/articles/news/5650663/the-civil-wars-debut-at-no-1-on-billboard-200-albums-chart|magazine=Billboard|publisher=Prometheus Global Media|date=2013-08-14|access-date=2013-08-14}} ==Track listing== {{tracklist | extra_column = Artist | title1 = [[I Love It (Icona Pop song)|I Love It]] | extra1 = [[Icona Pop]] featuring [[Charli
